title: Spatially resolved transcriptomic and proteomic profiling reveals cell interaction programs that predict Barrett's esophagus progression.
publicationName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
journalName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
snippet: Barrett's esophagus (BE) is the precursor lesion of esophageal adenocarcinoma (EAC). It affects approximately 5% of adults in the United States and significantly increases the risk of developing EAC. However, current surveillance strategies cannot reliably distinguish patients who will progress from those who will remain stable. Direct studies of progressor...
